composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
Bitcoin has broken below its 200-day moving average, confirming macro downtrend. Fear and Greed at 11 signals capitulation conditions, yet altcoin underperformance (ETH and SOL both negative on BTC) and stable dominance near 11% suggest orderly deleveraging rather than panic liquidation. The market is pricing risk-off but without structural dysfunction—typical bear regime behavior.

The death cross on BTC's moving averages and altcoin rotation weakness corroborate the BEAR phase. Missing funding data limits visibility into leverage extremes, but the absence of extreme z-scores in altcoin pairs and moderate 5-day drawdowns support BUSINESS_AS_USUAL conditions. No dislocation setup present; accumulation opportunity likely requires further duration below the 200-day MA.
